query:
-- GLOBAL CONTENT - FOOTER
INSERT INTO siteContent (page, section, contentKey, contentValue) VALUES
('global', 'footer', 'tagline', 'Catalyzing the rise of her through embodied transformation and conscious leadership.'),
('global', 'footer', 'column1Title', 'Explore'),
('global', 'footer', 'column2Title', 'Connect'),
('global', 'footer', 'column3Title', 'Stay Connected'),
('global', 'footer', 'newsletterHeading', 'Stay Connected'),
('global', 'footer', 'newsletterText', 'Join our monthly mailing list for insights and updates.'),
('global', 'footer', 'copyrightText', '© 2025 Just Empower™. All Rights Reserved.'),
('global', 'footer', 'instagramUrl', 'https://instagram.com/justxempower'),
('global', 'footer', 'linkedinUrl', 'https://linkedin.com/company/justxempower')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE contentValue = VALUES(contentValue);
